label: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE OUTPUT - NOT FOR APPLICATION USE
strategy: Position as a Platform Product Manager with verified product outcomes, role-relevant evidence, and Product OS proof used only as supporting context.
headline: Platform Product Manager | Architecture, Reliability & Technical Strategy
summary_direction: Product leader focused on Platform Product Manager roles, with evidence across APIs, Architecture, Reliability, Scalability. Selected proof points include LOG-THR-005, LOG-MRR-002, LOG-DEL-004. This draft uses Product OS as a supporting proof layer while preserving employer experience, metrics, and interview-defensible claims.
sections_excluded: Detailed tools if space is constrained

gaps.gap: Developer-platform depth may require careful framing
gaps.current_evidence: Platform architecture, throughput, payments platform, and roadmap governance evidence.
gaps.resume_mitigation: Use platform evidence; avoid overstating developer-tools specialization.
gaps.product_os_mitigation: Use Logix Product Leadership Brief and Decision Memo Template.

gaps.gap: Deep enterprise integration or admin tooling ownership may need review
gaps.current_evidence: Enterprise workflow, onboarding, platform, and customer discovery evidence.
gaps.resume_mitigation: Use enterprise SaaS and platform evidence only where supported.
gaps.product_os_mitigation: Use Product Discovery Toolkit or JoVE brief.
gaps.interview_mitigation: Prepare examples of enterprise workflow prioritization.

human_review_decisions: Approve final contact details before live use
expected_recruiter_signal: Clear Platform Product Manager positioning with traceable evidence.
